sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51294" key="i)sxai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσχαίνω</orth>, <sense id="n51294.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἰσχάνω</ref> </xr> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰσχναίνω</foreign> (qq.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
